title: Add variant selection helper coverage
verify: Pure variant selection helpers identify missing required options, impossible combinations, exactly one selected variant, unavailable variants, and single/default SKU behavior.
Helper tests prove add-to-cart validation cannot mark missing or impossible selections as valid.
evidence_required: Storefront product detail unit test output.
constraints: Keep selection logic local to storefront helpers and component state.
Do not change backend API semantics in this task.
Do not implement durable cart persistence.
invariants: Do not hardcode product variant data as source of truth.
Unavailable or impossible variants must not become valid add-to-cart selections.
purpose: Cover local variant selection rules that can otherwise pass happy-path UI tests while remaining wrong.
success_outcome: Variant selection helper behavior is deterministic for missing, impossible, unavailable, valid, and default-SKU cases.
anti_goals: Do not alter backend product detail semantics.
Do not implement durable cart persistence or cart merge.
